title: Villager on a leash
description: Simply use a leash with a villager like with other mobs
body:
# 🧑‍🌾 Villager on a leash – Take Your Villagers for a Walk!

With Villager on a leash, you can finally do what vanilla Minecraft doesn’t allow: leash villagers just like animals! No more pushing or building elaborate rails.
Move your farmers, librarians, and traders with ease.

## 🔹 Features:
- Leash villagers with a lead, just like mobs
- Works with all villager types and professions
- Leash wandering Traders when activated in config.yml

## 📝 Notes
- It's not possible yet to leash villagers together with other villagers/mobs. I will try to add that as soon as possible

##
